description: Shared 5V power input for both ESP32 modules
Phase A + GND output to Harvi/Zappi
Phase B + GND output to Harvi/Zappi
Phase C + GND output to Harvi/Zappi
Optional I2C pull-up on SCL to 3V3
Optional I2C pull-up on SDA to 3V3
Optional filter capacitor PHASE_A_DAC to GND
Optional filter capacitor PHASE_B_DAC to GND
Optional filter capacitor PHASE_C_DAC to GND
Decoupling near each ESP32 socket (5V to GND)
